examples: The result shows that the method has a reference value in the aerostat ballonet design.
Air_ray, modelled on the manta ray, is a remote-controlled hybrid construction consisting of a helium-filled ballonet and a beating wing drive.
It is present a method to design altitude control system for a high altitude airship using auxiliary ballonet charge or deflation and elevator combination control.
It uses three inflatable disc made of segmented lightweight gas ballonet materials which are contained within a ring mesh assembly which is attached to a larger expandable circumference ring.
